game_based_scenarios.game: Baltimore Orioles at Los Angeles Angels
Kansas City Royals at Tampa Bay Rays
game_based_scenarios.scope: Steal and multi-steal runner-event stress scenarios

defects_corrected: Overturned ABS challenge did not recalculate linked pitch or live count
Terminal ABS reversal did not always replace the invalid BB or KL result and restore half-inning state
Deleting an upheld terminal challenge could resurrect a completed 4-0 count
Third strike not caught displayed K+ WP/PB instead of K WP/PB
